---
title: "Publications"
---

# Featured

::: {.callout-note title="*Published 2026*: Complex Ethics Consultations, Volume 2, Co-edited by Dr. Paul J. Ford"}
![](images/complex_ethics_consultations_volume2_thumbnail.jpg){width="100px" style="float: right; margin-left: 20px;"}

**_Complex Ethics Consultations: Cases That Haunt Us_**  
**Cambridge University Press**

An exploration of ethically and emotionally complex real-world cases, co-edited by Paul J. Ford, PhD.  
🔗 [Read Online with Institutional Access to **Cambridge Core**](https://www.cambridge.org/core/books/complex-ethics-consultations/D09B15E9E2B502253E4A1BFCAA7A9D1C)  
📘 [Buy Print Edition](https://www.cambridge.org/us/universitypress/subjects/life-sciences/bioethics/complex-ethics-consultations-cases-haunt-us-new-era-volume-2?format=PB&isbn=9781009400909)
Get 20% off using code **CEC20** at checkout from Cambridge University Press. Offer valid through December 1, 2026. [Download Flyer (PDF)](/files/CEC_US%20Letter_Pre-order%20flyer.pdf)
:::


# Peer-Reviewed Articles

See a full list of publications and peer review activity on [ORCiD](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-5423-8845).
